title: Human Needs SDT PASS: structural alignment of SDT 3-need model with QA paired architecture
_fixture_purpose: Core claim: Ryan & Deci SDT's 3 validated basic needs (Autonomy, Competence, Relatedness) each decompose into a Robbins pair, and each pair maps to a structurally distinct QA pair type (generators, state+derivative, reach+integral). 5 structural predictions confirmed against SDT literature. Source: Will Dale Apr/Oct 2025, Ryan & Deci 2022.

sdt_pairing.note: Independent degrees of freedom; everything else derives from b and e
Where you are (d) + how fast you are changing (DeltaT); current mastery + rate of improvement
How far you reach (a) + what you have accumulated for others (SigmaT); bonding + giving

structural_predictions.claim: Autonomy is prerequisite for competence and relatedness
structural_predictions.qa_prediction: d and a are derived from b and e; generators must exist before derived quantities can be computed
structural_predictions.sdt_evidence: SDT research shows autonomy must be partially satisfied before competence and relatedness develop fully

structural_predictions.claim: Need satisfaction and frustration are partially independent dimensions
structural_predictions.qa_prediction: Within each QA pair, elements are independent (not inverses): b is not -e; d is not -DeltaT; a is not -SigmaT
structural_predictions.sdt_evidence: Bifactor-ESEM studies show satisfaction and frustration are partially independent, not opposite ends of one scale

structural_predictions.claim: Growth and contribution emerge after personality needs
structural_predictions.qa_prediction: DeltaT requires a sequence of tuples (multiple T-steps before a derivative exists); SigmaT requires DeltaT to integrate; operations are temporally downstream of elements
structural_predictions.sdt_evidence: Both Robbins and Maslow place growth/contribution (self-actualization/transcendence) as emerging after personality/deficiency needs are met

structural_predictions.claim: Contribution is the integration of growth; growth-contribution form a cycle
structural_predictions.qa_prediction: Fundamental theorem of discrete calculus: Sigma(DeltaT) = T; integrating growth reconstructs the self one level up; the new T seeds the next DeltaT
structural_predictions.sdt_evidence: Robbins describes growth naturally leading to contribution and contribution spurring further growth; Maslow places self-actualization as transitional to self-transcendence

structural_predictions.claim: All three SDT needs contribute independently to well-being
structural_predictions.qa_prediction: (b,e), (d,DeltaT), (a,SigmaT) are structurally distinct types: generators vs first-order derived vs second-order derived; related but not redundant
structural_predictions.sdt_evidence: SDT 27-country study (n=48550) showed autonomy, competence, relatedness each predict well-being independently after controlling for the others

derivation_witnesses.label: fundamental QN (1,1,2,3)
derivation_witnesses.note: Fibonacci seed; generators produce all derived quantities

theorem_nt_compliance.explanation: Psychological needs are continuous observer-layer projections of discrete QA dynamics. QA generates; psychology observes. Same paradigm as EEG topographic orbits, financial volatility regimes, climate teleconnection. Psychology does NOT feed back into QA as causal input.

source_grounding.detail: SDT validation across 27 European countries, n=48550, SEM with alignment invariance
First QA-Human Needs mapping: b=certainty, e=variety, d=significance, a=connection
Extended mapping with ΔT=growth, ΣT=contribution, toroidal geometry, psychophysiological coherence
Six Human Needs framework: certainty, variety, significance, connection, growth, contribution
Self-transcendence above self-actualization; growth as transitional to contribution

validation_checks.description: canonical mapping complete: 6 needs, 6 QA elements, all derivations valid
3 SDT needs present, each paired with exactly 2 Robbins needs
3 QA pair types present and structurally distinct (generators, state+derivative, reach+integral)
5 structural predictions, all confirmed against SDT literature
Theorem NT compliance declared: observer projection framing
